result.evidence_summary: The Sovereign2SilverStar (S2S) Ski Marathon, also referred to as Sovereign to SilverStar Loppet, is a real annual cross-country ski event from Sovereign Lake Nordic Centre to SilverStar Mountain Resort, with distances of 21km and 41km in classic and skate techniques. It has an active official website with registration pages for 2025 and 2026 events, mentions of past editions since 2022 including fundraising totals, and promotion on the organizing clubs' sites. No direct race results were found in the provided sources, but multiple independent venue and club pages confirm its organization and history.
